## Language

Which language would you like to translate to?

## Translation Status

- [ ] I'm starting a new translation
- [ ] I'm updating an existing translation
- [ ] I found errors in an existing translation

## Details

Describe what you'd like to translate or what needs to be corrected.

## Availability

Are you willing to maintain this translation for future updates?

## Additional Context

Add any context about regional variations or specific terminology preferences.
